_comment: ElevenLabs ConvAI webhook tool schema for book_appointment. Ported from elevenlabs.js:bookAppointmentTool(). The runtime assembler (stamp.py) substitutes {{webhook_base_url}} and {{client_slug}} before uploading via POST /v1/convai/tools.
name: {{client_slug}}__book_appointment
description: Book an appointment on the business calendar. Only call this AFTER confirming the slot is available (via check_availability) and the caller has provided their name, phone number, and reason for the visit. Read back the appointment details to the caller before calling this tool.

slot_iso.description: The exact ISO timestamp of the chosen slot, as returned by check_availability. Use the 'iso' field verbatim.

customer_name.description: The caller's full name. First name is required; last name is collected if offered.

customer_phone.description: The caller's callback phone number. Required — do not call this tool without it.

customer_email.description: The caller's email address. Optional — only include if volunteered by the caller.

service_id.description: Optional service ID from the business services list if the caller requested a specific service type.

reason.description: Short summary of why the caller is coming in (e.g. 'drain clog', 'water heater inspection', 'leak under sink'). Required.

notes.description: Any additional details the caller provided about the problem, access instructions, or preferences. Optional.

_response_contract.booked: boolean — true if the appointment was successfully created
_response_contract.appointmentId: string — GHL appointment ID (internal reference, do not read to caller)
_response_contract.confirmation: string — human-readable confirmation safe to read to caller (e.g. 'Thursday, April 17 at 10:00 AM')
_response_contract.error: string — present only if booked=false. Translate to plain English before speaking.

_pre_call_checklist: slot_iso obtained from check_availability this call
details read back to caller and confirmed
